summary:
A 72-year-old male experiencing new focal seizures should receive treatment with levetiracetam due to its efficacy specifically targeting this type of seizure without significant adverse effects or interaction concerns. Summary:

The elderly patient’s new focal seizures are well-managed by levetiracetam because it targets these seizures effectively and has fewer side-effects compared to other options available.
